title: phyllanthus major
intro: Phyllanthus major, also known as the Airy Cuckoo Flower or the Major Phyllanthus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus major include its ability to treat liver and kidney disorders, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is also used as a ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine.
